title: Renewable Gravel and Sand
description: Crafting recipes for making gravel and sand renewable
body:
Adds a recipe for duplicating sand using gravel, and a recipe for duplicating gravel using cobblestone. They use the same pattern diorite uses, and provide 4 per craft. (See gallery)
Now you don't have to do grueling sand or gravel mining ever again!

_Only tested in 1.21.7, almost certainly works in other versions though_
